---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to the public template, workflow, docs, or tooling
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the improvement you want.

## Problem

What limitation or friction does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the expected behavior or interface.

## Scope Notes

Please keep proposals aligned with this repository's purpose:

- reusable template behavior
- neutral documentation
- shared agent workflow guidance
- governance and safety tooling

Private downstream branding, real inbox paths, and personal workflow content belong in derived private repositories.

## Validation Or Examples

Add examples, sample commands, or links to related issues if helpful.
